name: Apees
recipeInstructions: Cream together the butter and sugar until the mixture is light and fluffy. Beat in the egg. Fold in the sour cream. Stir in the flour a little at a time, beating until the mixture is well blended. Wrap the dough and chill thoroughly. Roll dough on a lightly floured surface to 3/8-inch thickness. Cut with a 2-inch round cutter. Place rounds on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake at 350°F until edges are golden, 8 to 10 minutes.
